description_long: This object consists of two cylindrical beverage cans, both featuring the iconic Coca-Cola branding. The can in the foreground is predominantly black and red, labeled 'Zero Sugar' and 'Zero Calories', with bold white Coca-Cola script and silver top. The can in the background is classic red with white script, labeled 'Original Taste', and also has a silver top. Both cans display detailed product information, recycling symbols, and barcodes on their reverse sides, with some text in Japanese. The surfaces are metallic and glossy, reflecting light, and the tops are slightly indented with standard pull-tabs. The cans are typical of those found in urban environments, such as vending machines, convenience stores, or discarded on sidewalks.
description: Two metallic Coca-Cola cans, one 'Zero Sugar' (black/red) and one 'Original Taste' (red), with glossy surfaces and detailed branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Zero Sugar' can with bold white Coca-Cola script and the 'Original Taste' can partially visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view with both cans fully visible, highlighting the 'Zero Sugar' and 'Original Taste' labels and the silver tops.
description_view_2: Rear view showing product information, recycling symbols, and barcodes on both cans, with Japanese text.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view, focusing on the nutritional and recycling information panels of both cans.
attribute_brand_logo: Coca-Cola script logo, large and white, prominently displayed on the front of both cans; one on a red background, the other on a black/red background.
attribute_flavor_indication: 'Zero Sugar' and 'Original Taste' text on the cans indicate the flavor variant.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Yes, nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the back of both cans, including calorie and recycling details.
attribute_promotional_graphics: Olympic rings and related graphics are visible on the back of the cans, indicating a promotional tie-in.
